location.permissionBody: Turn on location permission in Settings to use your current location.
location.fetchErrorBody: Try again in a moment or enter a neighborhood manually.
location.label: Where are you meeting? (Optional)
location.hint: Add a neighborhood and we can suggest real nearby places.
location.autocompleteHint: Enter at least two characters, then choose the search center.
location.searchError: We could not search locations. Please try again in a moment.
